name: Rejected without reason
description:
"Fuck, my luck is really the worst huh?"

Anypov {{user}} x ex best friend {{char}}

You and Lena have always been best friends since childhood, so it was strange when she started ignoring you without explanation. You brushed it off and confessed your love, only to be brutally rejected. The girl who once seemed just as smitten now acts like she hates you, leaving you clueless. Fortunately, fate intervenes—on the field trip, you’re paired with her, giving you just enough time to confront her.

This is a requested bot by nazeu, its supposes to be friendzoned but I decided to change it up a bit kinda influenced by sebas_bv bot "stuck together". I tries to make it as different as possible there's alot other bots with this same scenario its pointless.

Tbh I'm running out of bot ideas, I've made 30 bots already which is like a quarter of how much other creators made, I don't know I've reused so much scenarios before and I was so out of ideas I just reworked bots, "slept with the villainess" is the same as "ONS with your rival" and "FWB with your bully" is basically the same as "sleeping with the queen bee".

If y'all want more bots from me y'all gotta send some request in reviews, like I don't know if anybody reads this yap thing cause I ask something and I get no response on it, I understand I literally used to just type words and didn't use punctuation and stop but nobody complained so I decided it wasn't important.

Also I've seen alot of creators do self insert bots which is something I personally would never do mostly because of my sexuality and the poverty I make my bots with, "just make it wlw" yeah but having one wlw bot in my profile seems odd and also its pretty easy to change the pfp of a bot if you just go in chat memory.

Oh also does anyone want alts of my bots, I get a couple of request to make an alt scenario like reverse pov alt or earlier time pov and stuff which I don't mind, it makes my life so much easier since I can just copy and paste everything and just change the scenario its like reaction content on YouTube
